## Summary

Describe the change and why it belongs in the public DQL surface.

## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] Docs, examples, or templates updated if the public workflow changed

## Release Impact

- [ ] No package release impact
- [ ] Patch release
- [ ] Minor release
- [ ] Major release

## Scope Check

- [ ] This change does not add DuckCode-only orchestration or product behavior
- [ ] Public APIs and docs stay aligned
